problem id: e97d9519
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01101110 -> 10111000
  01011011 -> 01101100
  10111111 -> 11111101
  11101000 -> 10100001
  01011110 -> 01111000
  11000100 -> 00010001
  11101100 -> 10110001
  00001010 -> 00101000
  00010000 -> 01000000
  00110010 -> 11001000

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 10011001
